name: Smono Baloo
summary: A budget dry-herb vaporiser with a swappable 18650 battery and adjustable airflow.
description: The Smono Baloo is a simple, low-maintenance dry-herb device with accurate temperature control from 100–240°C and adjustable airflow to tune each draw. Its standout feature is the replaceable 18650 battery (3400mAh), so you can carry a spare and keep going rather than wait for a charge. Expect 4–6 sessions per cell, with a silicone mouthpiece and a generous accessory kit in the box. It suits a budget-conscious patient who wants decent vapour and the practicality of swappable cells. The plastic build keeps the price down, so it's a value option rather than a long-haul premium device.
